PreToolUse.// 说明: 路径校验 — 拦截不符合小说目录规范的 Write/Edit 操作

hooks.command: bash -c 'D=$PWD; while [ ! -d "$D/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$D" != / ]; do D=$(dirname "$D"); done; exec python3 "$D/.claude/hooks/novel-path-validator.py"'

PreToolUse.// 说明: Agent 白名单 — 只放行 agent-allowlist.json 中授权的 Agent 调用

hooks.command: bash -c 'D=$PWD; while [ ! -d "$D/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$D" != / ]; do D=$(dirname "$D"); done; exec python3 "$D/.claude/hooks/agent-guard.py"'

PreToolUse.// 说明: 章节大纲提醒 — 写入 chapter-outlines/ 时注入逐章写入提醒

hooks.command: bash -c 'D=$PWD; while [ ! -d "$D/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$D" != / ]; do D=$(dirname "$D"); done; exec python3 "$D/.claude/hooks/chapter-outline-reminder.py"'
